transcript.text:
I've read the optimized skill (SKILL.md + all 8 references) and the requirements. This is an end-to-end reproduction of a **self-service knowledge base / customer portal** (big search hero + guide cards) in NocoBase env `appslib`, prefix `ssk_`, dark theme, with the embedded `nb-spec` as the authoritative source.

Let me set up task tracking and begin Phase 0 — load the prototype and its embedded spec.

transcript.cmd: {"query": "select:TaskCreate,TaskUpdate,TaskList", "max_results": 5}

{"command": "curl -s https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/34-self-service-kb.html -o p34-proto.html && echo "bytes: $(wc -c < p34-proto.html)" && echo "---NB-SPEC---" && python3 -c "
import re
html = open('p34-proto.html').read()
m = re.search(r'<script type=\"application/nb-spec\+json\">(.*?)</script>', html, re.S)
print(m.group(1).strip() if m else 'NO NB-SPEC FOUND')
"", "description": "Curl prototype and extract embedded nb-spec"}

transcript.text: Excellent — I have the authoritative `nb-spec`. Now let me examine the prototype's actual visual design (colors, layout, dark/light) so I know the visual target. Let me set up tasks and inspect the prototype rendering.

transcript.cmd:
{"command": "python3 -c "
import re
html = open('p34-proto.html').read()
# strip the nb-spec script and any script tags for readability of structure
# Print <style> contents (first 8000 chars) to understand palette
styles = re.findall(r'<style[^>]*>(.*?)</style>', html, re.S)
for s in styles:
    print(s[:9000])
"", "description": "Extract prototype CSS to learn palette/layout"}

{"command": "python3 -c "
import re
html = open('p34-proto.html').read()
styles = re.findall(r'<style[^>]*>(.*?)</style>', html, re.S)
for s in styles:
    print(s[9000:18000])
"", "description": "Extract remaining prototype CSS"}

transcript.text: Now let me see the body structure and the actual seed-data content baked into the prototype (so my English seed matches the visual target).

transcript.cmd:
{"command": "python3 -c "
import re
html = open('p34-proto.html').read()
# Get body, strip scripts and style
body = re.search(r'<body[^>]*>(.*?)</body>', html, re.S).group(1)
body = re.sub(r'<script.*?</script>', '', body, flags=re.S)
body = re.sub(r'<style.*?</style>', '', body, flags=re.S)
# collapse whitespace lines
body = re.sub(r'\n\s*\n', '\n', body)
print(body[:7000])
"", "description": "Extract prototype body HTML"}

transcript.text: Now let me extract the JS data arrays from the prototype so my English seed matches the visual target's content.

transcript.cmd:
{"command": "python3 -c "
import re
html = open('p34-proto.html').read()
scripts = re.findall(r'<script>(.*?)</script>', html, re.S)
for s in scripts:
    print(s[:6500])
"", "description": "Extract prototype JS seed data arrays"}

transcript.text:
I now fully understand the prototype: a **Helix Help Center** — light marketing portal with a purple gradient hero (big search + popular pills + live suggest), trending scroller, 6 guided category cards (all 6 colors), most-helpful articles list with helpful-% bars, and a contact CTA. 5 collections, 5 JS kernels.

Let me set up task tracking and explore the environment + sibling-skill command shapes in parallel.

{"subject": "Phase 2: Data model (5 collections, ssk_ prefix)", "description": "Build ssk_categories, ssk_articles, ssk_authors, ssk_tags, ssk_tickets with fields/enums/relations per nb-spec in one pass.", "activeForm": "Building data model"}

{"subject": "Phase 2: English seed (all enums/statuses \u22651)", "description": "Seed authors(5), tags, 6 categories (all colors), 12 articles (cover published/draft/archived, trending true/false), tickets (open/pending/solved). All English, matching prototype content.", "activeForm": "Seeding English data"}

{"subject": "Phase 2: List page per collection (native CRUD)", "description": "Table + Filter + Add + View/Edit drawer list page for each of the 5 collections.", "activeForm": "Building per-collection list pages"}

{"subject": "Phase 3: Help Center signature page (5 regions)", "description": "hero JSBlock, trending List+JSField scroller, categories List+JSField grid, popular List+JSField rows, contact CTA JSBlock. Container native, content JS.", "activeForm": "Building signature Help Center page"}
